grammar_focus.title: Using 'Compared to..., ...' for Comparison
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 寫作與口說中比較選項時，可用 Compared to 引出對照。
grammar_focus.pattern: Compared to A, B is more + adj.
grammar_focus.example_basic: Compared to passive reading, active recall is more effective.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: Compared to cramming before the test, daily micro-practice is more sustainable for adult learners.

reading.title: Health
reading.text: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information. Today's lesson highlights language such as 'outcome', 'emphasis for writing', 'manage results', and 'initial response', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners interpret the speaker's attitude and purpose. When writing academic responses, it is important to present a clear position and support it with evidence. Many instructors recommend combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A structured review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From phrases like 'initial in daily communication', 'academic insight', and 'mutual evidence', learners can extract patterns they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced approach helps candidates move toward their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.
reading.translation_tw: TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

listening_speaking.sentence: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: Today's lesson highlights language such as 'outcome', 'emphasis for writing', 'manage results', and 'initial response', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: Summarize the main idea of today's reading and add your opinion.
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds outcome over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'outcome'?
options: B. 與「強調」相關的常用片語
D. 與「最初的」相關的常用片語
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 outcome 的解釋為「結果」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

gmail_email.subject: Day 5 英文學習｜Health and Work-Life Balance
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 5 英文學習

今日主題：Health and Work-Life Balance

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：20 分鐘

今日訓練：Integrated basics - reading + listening + speaking/writing

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
outcome結果新詞
emphasis for writing與「強調」相關的常用片語新詞
manage results與「管理；處理」相關的常用片語新詞
initial response與「最初的」相關的常用片語新詞
initial in daily communication與「最初的」相關的常用片語新詞
academic insight與「洞察」相關的常用片語新詞
mutual evidence與「相互的」相關的常用片語新詞
academic finance與「財務；金融」相關的常用片語新詞
equivalent相等的；等同物新詞
key mechanism與「機制」相關的常用片語新詞
consume a response與「消耗；消費」相關的常用片語新詞
contribute results與「貢獻；促成」相關的常用片語新詞
principle原則新詞
interaction strategy與「互動」相關的常用片語新詞
academic margin與「差距；邊緣」相關的常用片語新詞
disadvantage in context與「缺點」相關的常用片語複習
consume a trend與「消耗；消費」相關的常用片語複習
policy政策複習
schedule/ˈskedʒuːl/行程；安排複習
pronunciation/prəˌnʌnsiˈeɪʃən/發音複習

文法重點

Using 'Compared to..., ...' for Comparison

寫作與口說中比較選項時，可用 Compared to 引出對照。

Compared to A, B is more + adj.

Compared to cramming before the test, daily micro-practice is more sustainable for adult learners.

閱讀：Health

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information. Today's lesson highlights language such as 'outcome', 'emphasis for writing', 'manage results', and 'initial response', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners interpret the speaker's attitude and purpose. When writing academic responses, it is important to present a clear position and support it with evidence. Many instructors recommend combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A structured review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From phrases like 'initial in daily communication', 'academic insight', and 'mutual evidence', learners can extract patterns they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced approach helps candidates move toward their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.

中文翻譯：TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

Today's lesson highlights language such as 'outcome', 'emphasis for writing', 'manage results', and 'initial response', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：Summarize the main idea of today's reading and add your opinion.

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds outcome over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'outcome'?

  • A. 結果
  • B. 與「強調」相關的常用片語
  • C. 與「管理
  • D. 與「最初的」相關的常用片語

答案：A — 今日單字 outcome 的解釋為「結果」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
